data_gaps: designed-run vs scramble split and red-zone rush share not retrievable (needs nflverse pbp)
injury status unavailable in frozen world
Justin Fields absent from NYJ depth chart (captured 2025-02-20) -- starter status unverifiable
J.J. McCarthy: no NFL stats (2024 missed) -- confidence capped

rankings.rationale: 474 attempts + 139 carries/915 rushing yards, stable through the last 8 (25.6 PPG) -- the pool's best dual-volume profile.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Carries below 6/game across Weeks 1-3.

rankings.rationale: 483 attempts + 102 carries with 12 rushing TDs and a 27.5-PPG last 8 -- goal-line rush opportunity no other passer has; TD rate regressed, floor intact.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Goal-line rushes shifting to a RB early.

rankings.rationale: 148 carries/891 yards + 480 attempts with the rush volume growing late (66/432 in the last 8) -- expanding opportunity in a 61.8-plays/game offense.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Designed rush volume below 5 carries/game early.

rankings.rationale: 10.0 carries/game and 14 rushing TDs -- a goal-line monopoly that is pure opportunity -- against a passing side capped by the 41.9%-pass offense.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Under 8 rush-TD pace or attempts below 20/game.

rankings.rationale: 652 attempts in a 63.2%-pass offense at 24.4 PPG late -- the pool's largest passing-volume base; no rush value, so the attempts ARE the thesis.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Pass rate below 58% under a healthier run game.

rankings.rationale: 570 attempts in a 62-plays/game offense -- this pass weights the raw volume base over Nix's dual usage; the 41-TD efficiency is regressed hard.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Attempts below 32/game while TD rate reverts.

rankings.rationale: 567 attempts + 92 carries with a rising late window (20.8 PPG) -- second-year volume under the same play-caller.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Rush attempts below 4/game early.

rankings.rationale: 23.2 PPG over the last 8 on 539 attempts in the pool's highest-volume offense -- this pass weights that late window up despite zero rush value and the new-coordinator unknown.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: New-coordinator play volume or pass rate dropping materially.

rankings.rationale: 541 attempts + 78 carries/572 yards over a full 17 -- dual volume with a modest late rise, capped by 59.2 plays/game.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Rush volume below 4 carries/game in the first month.

rankings.rationale: 581 attempts at 99.3% snaps -- maximum volume security; output already reflects role-average efficiency.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: A sustained run-lean shift below 54% pass.

rankings.rationale: 455 attempts + 66 carries/323 yards/5 TDs -- the rush production edges him past Herbert on this pass; the passing tree redistributes Samuel's 127 vacated targets.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Rush usage under 2 carries/game with McCaffrey healthy.

rankings.rationale: 504 attempts, rising late window (19.0 PPG), run-lean offense with a turned-over backfield -- attempt volume has room up.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Pass rate staying under 52%.

rankings.rationale: 562 attempts + 81 carries/489 yards with zero rush TDs -- held volume plus role-average efficiency projects above his 15.0 PPG rookie output.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: New-staff play volume below 57/game, or rush volume halving.

rankings.rationale: 286 attempts in 8 games (~600 pace) in a 59.8%-pass offense -- top-5 volume base if healthy, no rush value, half-season sample; this pass ranks the volume base over Fields' unverifiable role.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: A healthy 36+ attempt/game September (up 5+).

rankings.rationale: 40 carries/205 yards/5 TDs across his last 8 appearances is an elite rush floor IF he starts -- which my pre-free-agency NYJ chart cannot confirm; the confidence prices that gap.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Confirmed 17-start runway (up 5+); benching risk (down 8+).

rankings.rationale: 19.6 PPG over the last 8 with 30 carries/208 yards -- a late-window role change my rules weight; Carolina's league-worst passing EPA caps it.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: The late-2024 rush usage disappearing early.

rankings.rationale: 36 attempts/game across an 11-game season -- top-3 per-game pass volume, zero rush value, availability the entire risk.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: A healthy first half (up 3-5).

rankings.rationale: 532 attempts of secure volume against a declining late window (11.3 PPG), negative team passing EPA, and 105 vacated targets -- volume argues rebound, everything else argues flat.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Top-12 PPG September on unchanged volume (up 5+).

rankings.rationale: 54 carries/421 rushing yards in 13 rookie games is a real dual-threat base with room to grow into a full season; the environment (57.4 plays/game, negative passing EPA) is the cap.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: 6+ carries/game in a faster offense (up 5+).

rankings.rationale: 425 attempts in 15 games inside a 47.7%-pass offense with no rush value -- structurally capped volume.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Pass rate exceeding 53% sustainably.

rankings.rationale: A 10-game injury season in the pool's lowest-volume offense under a new staff (play volume unknowable) with 218 vacated targets -- too many unknowns for more than a volume-floor rank.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: New-staff play volume above 62/game (up 5+).

rankings.rationale: 517 stable attempts, zero rush value, and 214 vacated targets from Kupp's exit -- a pure-volume floor with no visible ceiling path.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: A 21+ PPG September on unchanged volume.

rankings.rationale: No NFL usage data (2024 missed) -- confidence capped; QB1 listing in a 54.5%-pass offense with an intact receiving corps is the entire case.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: Early rushing usage (up 3-5); quick-hook risk (down).

rankings.rationale: 105 attempts across 5 games with negligible rush value -- thinnest evidence base among returning starters; QB1 listing in a 62-plays/game offense is the runway.
rankings.what_would_change_my_mind: 34+ attempts/game at positive EPA in September (up 5+).
